title: The False Consensus Effect: An Egocentric Bias in Social Perception

evaluation_framework.description: Two-tier evaluation: phenomenon-level (FCE presence) and data-level matching

type_1.name: phenomenon_level_match
type_1.description: Tests whether agent exhibits False Consensus Effect: Estimate(Own_Choice) > Estimate(Other_Choice)
type_1.approach: Compare estimates of peer consensus conditional on the agent's choice. Pass if diff > 0 and significant.

type_2.name: data_level_match
type_2.description: Tests magnitude of the consensus gap against human data
type_2.approach: Comparison of FCE magnitude (Mean_A - Mean_B) with original study results.

study_2.note: Average difference across 34 items in original study was roughly 10-15%
